_comment: Species: Giant Head Ancient Clansman (大头古族) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Giant Head Ancient Clansman

canonical.appearance: Humanoid ancient clan being 20 m tall, head disproportionately massive, body radiates ancient clan power
canonical.size: 20 m adult, 100000 jin; ancient 50 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Ancient clan being; head contains vast ancient power; Wang Lin obtained the skull as treasure
canonical.habitat: Ancient clan territory, ancient clan ruins
canonical.diet: ancient clan herbs, spirit stones, ancient qi
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained giant head skull as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: giant_head_ancient_clansman — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
